title_en: Internet, Digital & Social Media English System
title: Internet, Digital & Social Media English System ()

categories.name: (इंटरनेट, डिजिटल एवं सोशल मीडिया अंग्रेज़ी प्रणाली)
categories.intro:
Teacher Introduction
बच्चों, अब तक आपने:
grammar
spoken English
fluency
academic English
literature
professional communication
समझ लिया।
अब हम English के उस आधुनिक स्तर में प्रवेश करेंगे जहाँ:
language:
internet
social media
online communication
chat culture
meme culture
digital interaction
का माध्यम बनती है।
क्योंकि: आज की दुनिया में digital English समझना real necessity बन चुका है।

categories.name: Main Goal of Part 44
categories.intro:
Student:
internet English समझ सके
chat English पहचान सके
social media expressions समझ सके
online abbreviations use कर सके
meme language समझ सके
digital communication कर सके

categories.name: Included Systems
categories.intro:
1. Chat English System
2. Internet Abbreviation System
3. Social Media Expression System
4. Meme Language System
5. Emoji Communication System
6. Online Conversation System
7. Digital Culture Vocabulary System
8. Informal Internet Grammar System
9. Online Safety & Communication System
10. Digital English Drill System

categories.name: 1. Chat English System
categories.intro: (चैट अंग्रेज़ी प्रणाली)

categories.name: What is Chat English?
categories.intro:
Fast, short, informal English जो:
messaging
chatting
texting
online interaction
में उपयोग होती है।

categories.name: Examples
categories.intro:
Hi
Hey
What’s up?
Sup?
How r u?
I’m fine.

categories.name: Short Forms
categories.intro:
you → u
are → r
please → pls
message → msg

categories.name: Example Conversation
categories.intro:
A: Hey, what’s up?
B: Nothing much. Wbu?

categories.name: Meaning
categories.intro:
wbu
→ what about you?

categories.name: Important Understanding
categories.intro: Chat English: formal writing नहीं होती।

categories.name: 2. Internet Abbreviation System
categories.intro: (इंटरनेट संक्षिप्त शब्द प्रणाली)

categories.name: Common Internet Short Forms
categories.intro:
LOL
→ laughing out loud
BRB
→ be right back
OMG
→ oh my God
IDK
→ I don’t know
IMO
→ in my opinion
BTW
→ by the way
TTYL
→ talk to you later
DM
→ direct message
AFK
→ away from keyboard
FYI
→ for your information

categories.name: Example
categories.intro: OMG! That’s amazing.

categories.name: Example
categories.intro: BRB, I need water.

categories.name: Important Understanding
categories.intro: Internet abbreviations: speed communication के लिए बने हैं।

categories.name: 3. Social Media Expression System
categories.intro: (सोशल मीडिया अभिव्यक्ति प्रणाली)

categories.name: Common Expressions
categories.intro:
Trending
Viral
Followers
Content creator
Influencer
Subscribe
Like & share
Go viral

categories.name: Example
categories.intro: His video went viral.

categories.name: Example
categories.intro: She is a popular content creator.

categories.name: Important Understanding
categories.intro: Social media: new vocabulary create करती है।

categories.name: 4. Meme Language System
categories.intro: (मीम भाषा प्रणाली)

categories.name: What is Meme Language?
categories.intro: Funny, sarcastic, exaggerated online expression।

categories.name: Examples
categories.intro:
Cringe
Savage
Roasted
NPC
Sigma
Based

categories.name: Example
categories.intro: That joke was cringe.

categories.name: Example
categories.intro: He roasted everyone in the debate.

categories.name: Important Understanding
categories.intro: Meme language: youth internet culture से जुड़ी होती है।

categories.name: 5. Emoji Communication System
categories.intro: (इमोजी संचार प्रणाली)

categories.name: Emojis Carry Emotion
categories.intro:
😂
→ laughing
😭
→ extreme sadness/funny crying
🔥
→ awesome/popular
💀
→ “I’m dead laughing”
🤡
→ foolish behavior
🗿
→ emotionless/sigma meme style

categories.name: Example
categories.intro: That video was hilarious 😂

categories.name: Important Understanding
categories.intro: Modern communication: text + emoji दोनों से बनती है।

categories.name: 6. Online Conversation System
categories.intro: (ऑनलाइन वार्तालाप प्रणाली)

categories.name: Casual Chat
categories.intro:
Hey bro, what are you doing?
Just chilling.

categories.name: Gaming Chat
categories.intro:
GG
→ good game
Noob
→ beginner player
Lag
→ internet delay

categories.name: Streaming Culture
categories.intro:
Live stream
Subscriber
Donation
Reaction video

categories.name: Example
categories.intro: The stream was lagging badly.

categories.name: Important Understanding
categories.intro: Digital communities: अपनी अलग language बनाती हैं।

categories.name: 7. Digital Culture Vocabulary System
categories.intro: (डिजिटल संस्कृति शब्दावली प्रणाली)

categories.name: Common Digital Words
categories.intro:
algorithm
hashtag
thumbnail
podcast
livestream
analytics
engagement
reach
viral
AI-generated

categories.name: Example
categories.intro: The algorithm pushed his video.

categories.name: Example
categories.intro: Good thumbnails increase clicks.

categories.name: Important Understanding
categories.intro: Digital English: future communication language बन रही है।

categories.name: 8. Informal Internet Grammar System
categories.intro: (अनौपचारिक इंटरनेट व्याकरण प्रणाली)

categories.name: Internet English अक्सर:
categories.intro:
grammar ignore करती है
punctuation छोड़ देती है
lowercase use करती है

categories.name: Example
categories.intro: bro thats crazy

categories.name: Formal Version
categories.intro: Bro, that’s crazy.

categories.name: Example
categories.intro: idk what happened lol

categories.name: Formal Version
categories.intro: I do not know what happened. It was funny.

categories.name: Important Understanding
categories.intro: Internet grammar: real grammar replacement नहीं है।

categories.name: 9. Online Safety & Communication System
categories.intro: (ऑनलाइन सुरक्षा एवं संचार प्रणाली)

categories.name: Important Digital Rules
categories.intro:
never share passwords
avoid fake links
respect privacy
avoid online abuse
verify information

categories.name: Online Politeness
categories.intro:
Please avoid spam.
Respect others online.
Think before posting.

categories.name: Important Understanding
categories.intro: Digital communication: responsibility भी मांगती है।

categories.name: 10. Digital English Drill System
categories.intro: (डिजिटल अंग्रेज़ी अभ्यास प्रणाली)

categories.name: Chat Drill
categories.intro:
A: Hey, wyd?
B: Just studying English.

categories.name: Meaning
categories.intro:
wyd
→ what are you doing?

categories.name: Meme Drill
categories.intro: That meme was savage.

categories.name: Social Media Drill
categories.intro: Her reel went viral.

categories.name: Abbreviation Drill
categories.intro: IDK what happened.

categories.name: Digital Vocabulary Drill
categories.intro: The algorithm increased engagement.

categories.name: Online Safety Drill
categories.intro: Never click suspicious links.

categories.name: Final Digital English Formula
categories.intro:
Vocabulary
+
Internet Culture
+
Digital Awareness
+
Online Expressions
+
Fast Communication
+
Social Media Understanding
Modern Digital English Mastery

categories.name: Final Goal of Part 44
categories.intro:
Student:
internet English समझ सके
social media vocabulary पहचान सके
online abbreviations use कर सके
meme language समझ सके
digital communication कर सके
online culture समझ सके
internet expressions पहचान सके
modern digital English mastery प्राप्त कर सके।
